jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Hypercity
jsonLd.description:
We at Hypercity are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Kanpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Hypercity:
Hypercity is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hypercity!
